nodes.name: AppAccessEnums.swift
nodes.summary: Defines monetization access enums: AccessTier (free/core/pro), ConnectionPlan, and the one-time Milestone events that fire visible in-app moments.

nodes.name: AccessTier
nodes.summary: The three couple-level access tiers (free, core lifetime, pro) — one purchase covers both partners. Read by EntitlementService DTOs.

nodes.name: Milestone
nodes.summary: Enumerates one-time milestone events (opened first deck, linked partner, etc.) that never reset once completed; persisted via MilestoneRecord.

nodes.name: AppCardEnums.swift
nodes.summary: Card and deck taxonomy enums: CardType mechanics, CardIntensity (8 levels with sorting + difficulty mapping), CardStatus, WhoStarts, GenderDynamic, DeckCategory.

nodes.name: CardType
nodes.summary: Enumerates every card kind (prompt, whisper, mirror, dare, ritual, etc.) that determines how the session renders a card and which reveal mechanic fires.

nodes.name: CardIntensity
nodes.summary: 8-level emotional-intensity scale (void → supernova), Comparable with difficulty labels and static mappers from JSON difficulty strings and numeric scores.

nodes.name: DeckCategory
nodes.summary: Categorizes decks (foundation, relationship core, NM-specific, solo prep, multi-person, etc.) to drive library organization and recommendations.

nodes.name: CandleIntensity
nodes.summary: Render-layer experience-level enum (curious/exploring/experienced) decoupled from the domain NMStage, mapping 1:1 onto it for the candle selection UI.

nodes.name: AppDesireEnums.swift
nodes.summary: Desire Map enums: DesireMapState (home indicator), DesireRatingValue (4-point weight with the sacred notForMe boundary), and DesireMatchType.

nodes.name: DesireMapState
nodes.summary: Models the full lifecycle of the home Desire Map indicator (hidden, gated, yourTurn, bothReady, revealed, etc.) with associated values; Equatable via a manual switch.

nodes.name: DesireRatingValue
nodes.summary: The fixed 4-point desire weight (excited/open/probablyNot/notForMe); notForMe is the sacred boundary protected by three enforcement layers and never leaves the device.

nodes.name: AppEnums.swift
nodes.summary: Core onboarding/routing and UI enums: NMStage, AppMode, EmotionalRegister, AgencySignal, MotivationShape, RelationshipContext, plus PartnerChipState and the AppIcons SF Symbol registry.
nodes.languageNotes: Hosts a global RawRepresentable+Identifiable extension giving all String-backed enums a free id, reused across the codebase.

nodes.name: NMStage
nodes.summary: Where a person is in their NM journey (curious/exploring/experienced); lives on UserProfile and drives default card difficulty and content routing.

nodes.name: EmotionalRegister
nodes.summary: The aspirational tone register (anxious/excited/flexible/unknown) collected at onboarding; includes a slider-value-to-register mapper. Governs card copy warmth.

nodes.name: MotivationShape
nodes.summary: What would feel like a win for the user (Compass Q2); one enum whose option set and labels adapt by AppMode, driving card-category priority.

nodes.name: RelationshipContext
nodes.summary: The concrete relationship starting point (solo and couple subsets) collected in ContextPhase; persisted for record while SituationalRegister drives behavior.

nodes.name: PartnerChipState
nodes.summary: State of the home-dashboard partner chip (none, invitePending, nudge, active, multipleActive) computed by HomeEventEngine; Equatable via manual switch.

nodes.name: AppIcons
nodes.summary: Namespaced registry of every SF Symbol string used in the app; raw symbol literals are banned, so all icons reference these static constants.

nodes.name: AppOBEnums.swift
nodes.summary: Onboarding-canvas-exclusive enums: OBPhase sequence, OBCredential, DemoVerb, OpenerDeckType, AgeRange, RelationshipTenure, and the AppDealerTyping timing engine.

nodes.name: OBPhase
nodes.summary: The complete ordered sequence of onboarding canvas phases (stat → demo → ... → founderLetter); VaylDirector is the only reader/writer and advances through these in order.

nodes.name: AppDealerTyping
nodes.summary: Pure-math timing contract for all onboarding dealer copy — per-character delays, deterministic type-duration estimate, hang times, shuffle/float transition animations, and the dealer font.

nodes.name: typeDuration
nodes.summary: Computes the deterministic mean type-out time of a dealer line in ms so phases can gate interactivity until the dealer finishes asking; mirrors charDelay.

nodes.name: AppPulseEnums.swift
nodes.summary: Pulse check-in enums: PulseSource, InsightType, PulseCapacityColor, PulseTier (score-to-tier with color/label), and PulseWindow (time-range filtering for the pulse graph).

nodes.name: PulseTier
nodes.summary: Tier derived from a pulse capacity score (expansive/sovereign/friction/protective) with a static score-to-tier mapper plus color, label and sublabel for rendering.

nodes.name: PulseWindow
nodes.summary: Time-window selector for the pulse graph (1W → all) computing start dates, entry filtering, day counts, graph widths, and accessibility labels.

nodes.name: AppTab.swift
nodes.summary: The four-tab navigation enum (home/play/map/learn) providing SF Symbol icon names and display labels for the main tab bar.

nodes.name: UserDefaultsKey.swift
nodes.summary: Single source of truth for raw UserDefaults key strings (currently the onboarding-completion launch-routing mirror) to prevent duplicate-literal desyncs across layers.

nodes.name: LockInSession.swift
nodes.summary: SwiftData @Model recording the pre-session emotional bandwidth check-in for both partners; device-only, computes bandwidth gap once on write and exposes significance helpers.

nodes.name: LockInSession
nodes.summary: SwiftData model for the Lock In pre-session bandwidth capture (partner A/B bandwidth, gap, LDR flag) with computed hasSignificantGap / bothExpansive / bothProtective and preview fixtures.

nodes.name: MilestoneRecord.swift
nodes.summary: SwiftData @Model recording a one-time milestone completion per user; device-only, holds optional Beacon item IDs for the research-orbs milestone.

nodes.name: MilestoneRecord
nodes.summary: SwiftData model for a completed Milestone (with optional beaconItemsRead for readThreeResearchOrbs) exposing researchOrbsComplete and example fixtures.

nodes.name: PulseEntry.swift
nodes.summary: Plain Codable struct for one pulse check-in (capacity score + Q1–Q5 answers) cached in UserDefaults via PulseStore; includes a tier accessor and rich preview data.

nodes.name: PulseEntry
nodes.summary: Codable value type holding one pulse entry's capacity score, glow color and the five check-in answer labels; a device-level cache, not a SwiftData model.
